events.name: Venture Capital Rain
events.description: Equity Sales grant +$3 extra cash this round.

events.name: Tech Bubble
events.description: All Active Maintenance Products generate +$1 Revenue this round.

events.name: Patent Trolls
events.description: Licensing Fee increased to $5 (from $3) this round.

events.name: Angel Investors
events.description: Players with Tier 1 Products only (no Tier 2/3) gain $3 immediately.

events.name: Legacy Code
events.description: Revenue Decay increased to -$2 per Bug (instead of -$1) this round.

events.name: Regulation Audit
events.description: Pay $1 for every Employee on Board with Salary > $0. Discard unpaid.

events.name: Open Source Boom
events.description: All Software output is +1 this round.

events.name: Hardware Hackathon
events.description: All Hardware output is +1 this round.

events.name: Crunch Time
events.description: All Dev Teams produce +1 Cube but MUST add 1 Bug Token.

events.name: Server Crash
events.description: All Software Staff in Ops produce -1 Bandwidth this round.

events.name: Supply Chain Logjam
events.description: All Hardware output is -1 this round (Dev and Ops).

events.name: Recruiter Frenzy
events.description: Poaching costs 1x Base Cost (instead of 2x) this round.

events.name: Intern Season
events.description: Recruiting from University costs $0 this round.

events.name: Headhunter Holiday
events.description: Hostile Offers (Poaching) are Suspended this round.

events.name: Online Course Boom
events.description: Training action costs $1 (instead of $3) this round.

events.name: Whistleblower Protection Act
events.description: Bank Reward for successful Audit (Settlement) doubled to $8.

events.name: Trade Show
events.description: PR Campaigns cost $2 (Half Price) this round.
